name: Nasiba M. A.
review: I was recommended to Heritage Kidney and Medical Care by my husband’s friend when he got to know I had Kidney Failure. I had visited many hospitals in Abuja but none could give me the treatment I expected. In fact we were already processing our papers to travel abroad for treatment before the recommendation to HKMC came. We decided to give it a try before proceeding with the travel. There at Heritage, I met Dr. Sunday, the consultant Nephrologist, and after my discussion with him, his words were convincing and he told me that I would need a kidney Transplant. I started the process and eventually had my transplant on 22nd February 2026. The experience was fantastic as I could feel myself bouncing back to my real self after months of weakness. The Nurses are fantastic, I will give them 100%. I appreciate the management and I will keep praying for them for the work that they do. I say Thank you to HKMC.

name: Alhaji Umar S. G.
review: I got to know Heritage through Dr. Elijah Miner who is a childhood friend and the CMD of Caroline Medical Centre before it changed to Heritage Kidney and Medical Care. I was visiting the hospital for Nephrology Consultation where I was diagnosed of Chronic Kidney Disease. The condition got worse and finally required Dialysis. I started my Dialysis in another hospital but eventually returned to HKMC when it opened its centre well equipped with Dialysis machines and became the largest dialysis center in West Africa. I had my Kidney Transplant in June 2025 and the services I received was always excellent. Every staff always encouraged us through the challenges and it made me feel better. I have already recommended this hospital to people who have kidney failures because their services are excellent and I will continue to recommend anyone who needs such services. I say kudos to the management and I encourage them to keep improving because there is always room for improvement but they are doing great so far.

name: Enuma A. C.
review: My Name is Enuma Chike-Obi, I am 10years old. I have been to different hospitals with my parents but we were not getting good attention and had to stay on queues before getting machine to dialyse. We even traveled to South Africa for treatment and was making arrangements to travel abroad before getting recommended to HKMC. When we got here, we did not have to wait on queues to get space to dialyse. The Nurses are nice and I even made some new friends, Nurse Naanman, Mr. Festus and Mr. Godwin, etc. I have successfully had my kidney transplant on 21st February, 2026 and I say thank you to Dr. Tada. Thank you to the management and Thank you to all the nurses.

name: Salamat A. Y.
review: A nurse in Ilorin where I was having my dialysis recommended Heritage Kidney and Medical Care to us. I and My mum came to Abuja and to HKMC and the services we have received is very good. The environment is serene with no disturbance. I will rate the services 9/10 because there is always room for improvement. At HKMC, you guys are doing you best to be the Best and I say a big thank you to the management for the Good services they provide. I have successfully had my kidney transplant and I thank all the staff of HKMC for how they took care of me.

name: Godwin U. A.
review: I came in to Abuja from Lagos and started my dialysis in other hospitals in Abuja. The services they rendered were slow and I wasn’t satisfied with it until someone recommended me to Heritage Kidney and Medical Care. When I got to HKMC, their services were swift. Registration and Documentation, all done in less than 20 minutes. They staff always had a way to say calm words that will make you calm and even the needle pricks would not hurt as in other hospitals. The nurses are dedicated and excellent. One thing that stands out is their attention to details. The customer service reps are very amazing and have a strong communication ethics as they will always stay in touch both on Whatsapp and SMS to get vital information across to you. I will confidently recommend this hospital to anybody. In fact, I have recommended two people already who require your services. I will say Thank you to the management for all they do and I encourage you to continue to improve because to keep being the Best, you need continuous improvement.

name: Sadiq Ahmed
review: The transplant success rate speaks for itself. I’m forever grateful.

name: Ngozi Obi
review: The nurses treated me like family throughout my recovery.

name: Daniel Adeyemi
review: Modern facilities and transparent communication. Highly recommended.

name: Hauwa Sule
review: I felt safe and confident during every procedure.

name: Michael Johnson
review: International standards right here in Nigeria.

name: Blessing Udo
review: The team is knowledgeable and incredibly reassuring.

name: Samuel Nwankwo
review: State-of-the-art dialysis machines and excellent care.

name: Aisha Mohammed
review: Their second opinion helped me make the right life-saving decision.

name: Victor Adebayo
review: Professionalism at every level. Truly outstanding.

name: Ruth Daniel
review: I appreciate the follow-up care after my surgery.

name: Ifeanyi Okoro
review: Their dialysis centre is the best I have seen.

name: Halima Abubakar
review: The staff are patient, kind, and highly skilled.

name: Peter Ekanem
review: Everything was seamless and reassuring.

name: Zainab Aliyu
review: Clean, modern, and very organized facility.

name: Emmanuel George
review: A truly life-changing experience.
